inputs.name: deletable
inputs.description: Defines whether the search item is deletable.

inputs.name: description
inputs.description: Defines the description that appears right under the item text, if available.

inputs.name: icon
inputs.description:
Defines the icon name of the search item.
*Note:** If provided, the image slot will be ignored.

inputs.name: scopeName
inputs.description: Defines the scope of the search item

inputs.name: selected
inputs.description: Defines whether the search item is selected.

inputs.name: text
inputs.description: Defines the heading text of the search item.

outputs.name: ui5Delete
outputs.description: Fired when delete button is pressed.
